title: Claude AI can NOW Automatically Build and Improve Your TradingView Strategies (while you sleep)
author: MichaelIonita
summary_bullets: AI is now capable of improving your trading strategies while you're sleeping.
Using the back testing engine that I've developed, AI can finally iterate through its own ideas and only give you a strategy if it's better than before.
This is a gamecher and these are the results.
I gave it the super trend strategy.
It has rookie numbers as you can see.
And this is how the AI improved it.
And then I thought, what if it can create a better strategy than my botfast re-entry from the master class if I give it enough time?
So I went to sleep and I let it calculate.
And then I woke up to this.
The AI was able to create a strategy that makes it into my top three riskreward ranking.
